Ice 2 v2.0.1 renames the app and user-facing content from Ice to Ice 2, updates the app bundle name to Ice 2.app, and bumps the app version to 2.0.1 (build 1122).

Ice 2.0.0 build from commit 54c83a2.

- Includes the macOS 26 compatibility fixes and audited upstream PR ports.
- Developer ID signed, timestamped, notarized, and stapled.
- Universal binary: arm64 and x86_64.
